text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well... You know what this means,
right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! But I haven't even said what your
punishment is yet!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, it's nothing too difficult... Though, it
will take some elbow grease.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll be working right alongside you too. Come on,
time to make good friends with the brooms and
mops in Ritto Dorm!
